summary_context: Successfully merged the dailyReport branch into the integration branch. Cleanly resolved all backend and frontend conflicts according to specified menu rules. Overwrote corrupt and duplicate user validation schemas with the clean, Thai-localized UTF-8 version supplied by the user. Removed the birthday field (dateOfBirth / birthDate) entirely from the frontend forms, pages, and validation schemas to streamline the member management form. Checked type safety using npm run type-check inside both backend and frontend workspaces and confirmed zero errors. Synced variables using the symbol indexer, committed all merge resolutions and index changes, deleted the local temporary branch, and pushed the final integration branch to remote origin/integration.
